name: Review Write Operations
description: Before any file write, verify it follows project coding standards and doesn't break existing components

then.prompt: A file write is about to happen. Verify: (1) The file follows the project's React + Tailwind coding style, (2) It doesn't duplicate existing component logic, (3) It doesn't break imports in App.jsx or other components. If all good, proceed. If not, flag the issue.
